Prof. Dr. Assoc. Prof. Dr. Gözde Çörekçioğlu İshakoğlu and PhD Student Atakan Açıkgöz Project Support from TÜBİTAK 1002 Program

The project titled “Employers’ Perspective on Remote Working” submitted by Dr. Gözde Çörekçioğlu İshakoğlu and Ph. Prof. Dr. Gözde Çörekçioğlu İshakoğlu and PhD student Atakan Açıkgöz’s project titled “Employers’ Perspective on Remote Working” has been entitled to be supported under the TÜBİTAK 1002 program.
